prompt: A highly detailed, photorealistic commercial poster. In the center, 1 large Zongzi (sticky rice dumpling wrapped in glossy green bamboo leaves and tied securely with twine) floating magically in mid-air. The background features traditional Chinese red wooden double doors with rows of golden studs and 2 ornate golden lion-head door knockers, slightly out of focus. Floating around the center are various ingredients: on the bottom left, 1 halved salted duck egg with a rich, oozing orange yolk; on the bottom right, 1 small square wooden tray overflowing with dark red beans, and 1 whole, translucent orange salted egg yolk floating nearby. Several small red beans and glowing embers are suspended in the air. Above the central item, large, stylized golden calligraphy text reading "端午安康" formed from magical, swirling golden smoke rising upward. At the very bottom, bold, metallic golden serif text reading "满99减20". Cinematic lighting, rich red and gold color palette, festive and magical atmosphere, high-end food photography style.
